title: Italy investigates Sephora and Benefit over skincare marketing to children
summary_full: Italy's competition authority said the LVMH-owned cosmetic brands Sephora and Benefit used an "insidious marketing strategy" to appeal to tween consumers.
summary_public: Italy's competition authority said the LVMH-owned cosmetic brands Sephora and Benefit used an "insidious marketing strategy" to appeal to tween consumers.

IT.label: neutral
IT.evidence: Italy investigates Sephora and Benefit over skincare marketing to children
